creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
Author: danilo
Date: Thu Oct 24 21:45:04 2013
New Revision: 331534
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/ports/331534

Log:
  - Update from 0.4.3 to 0.4.5
  
  PR:		ports/183243
  Submitted by:	csosstudy <csosstudy@gmail.com> (maintainer)

Modified:
  head/dns/dnscrypt-proxy/Makefile
  head/security/libsodium/Makefile
  head/security/libsodium/distinfo
  head/security/libsodium/pkg-plist

Modified: head/dns/dnscrypt-proxy/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/dns/dnscrypt-proxy/Makefile	Thu Oct 24 21:10:07 2013	(r331533)
+++ head/dns/dnscrypt-proxy/Makefile	Thu Oct 24 21:45:04 2013	(r331534)
@@ -3,7 +3,7 @@
 
 PORTNAME=	dnscrypt-proxy
 PORTVERSION=	1.3.2
-PORTREVISION=	1
+PORTREVISION=	2
 CATEGORIES=	dns
 MASTER_SITES=	http://download.dnscrypt.org/dnscrypt-proxy/ \
 		http://www.dns-lab.com/downloads/dnscrypt-proxy/

Modified: head/security/libsodium/Makefile
==============================================================================
--- head/security/libsodium/Makefile	Thu Oct 24 21:10:07 2013	(r331533)
+++ head/security/libsodium/Makefile	Thu Oct 24 21:45:04 2013	(r331534)
@@ -1,7 +1,7 @@
 # $FreeBSD$
 
 PORTNAME=	libsodium
-PORTVERSION=	0.4.3
+PORTVERSION=	0.4.5
 CATEGORIES=	security
 MASTER_SITES=	http://download.dnscrypt.org/libsodium/releases/
 

Modified: head/security/libsodium/distinfo
==============================================================================
--- head/security/libsodium/distinfo	Thu Oct 24 21:10:07 2013	(r331533)
+++ head/security/libsodium/distinfo	Thu Oct 24 21:45:04 2013	(r331534)
@@ -1,2 +1,2 @@
-SHA256 (libsodium-0.4.3.tar.gz) = 599ce19ae6ace2d30aee353b931088f720713c4e1d0b2918ed46de1914fb6042
-SIZE (libsodium-0.4.3.tar.gz) = 523169
+SHA256 (libsodium-0.4.5.tar.gz) = 7ad5202df53eeac0eb29b064ae5d05b65d82b2fc1c082899c9c6a09b0ee1ac32
+SIZE (libsodium-0.4.5.tar.gz) = 540467

Modified: head/security/libsodium/pkg-plist
==============================================================================
--- head/security/libsodium/pkg-plist	Thu Oct 24 21:10:07 2013	(r331533)
+++ head/security/libsodium/pkg-plist	Thu Oct 24 21:45:04 2013	(r331534)
@@ -1,3 +1,4 @@
+include/sodium.h
 include/sodium/core.h
 include/sodium/crypto_auth.h
 include/sodium/crypto_auth_hmacsha256.h
@@ -15,6 +16,8 @@ include/sodium/crypto_hash_sha256.h
 include/sodium/crypto_hash_sha512.h
 include/sodium/crypto_hashblocks_sha256.h
 include/sodium/crypto_hashblocks_sha512.h
+include/sodium/crypto_int32.h
+include/sodium/crypto_int64.h
 include/sodium/crypto_onetimeauth.h
 include/sodium/crypto_onetimeauth_poly1305.h
 include/sodium/crypto_onetimeauth_poly1305_53.h
@@ -35,8 +38,6 @@ include/sodium/crypto_stream_salsa20.h
 include/sodium/crypto_stream_salsa2012.h
 include/sodium/crypto_stream_salsa208.h
 include/sodium/crypto_stream_xsalsa20.h
-include/sodium/crypto_int32.h
-include/sodium/crypto_int64.h
 include/sodium/crypto_uint16.h
 include/sodium/crypto_uint32.h
 include/sodium/crypto_uint64.h
@@ -49,10 +50,9 @@ include/sodium/randombytes_salsa20_rando
 include/sodium/randombytes_sysrandom.h
 include/sodium/utils.h
 include/sodium/version.h
-include/sodium.h
-libdata/pkgconfig/libsodium.pc
-lib/libsodium.so.7
-lib/libsodium.so
-lib/libsodium.la
 lib/libsodium.a
-@dirrm include/sodium
+lib/libsodium.la
+lib/libsodium.so
+lib/libsodium.so.9
+libdata/pkgconfig/libsodium.pc
+@dirrmtry include/sodium
